parameters.message:
=🎬 **Your video is ready!**

👉 Please review it carefully and approve it.
✅ Once approved, it will be uploaded to **YouTube** and **Reels**.

🔗 Video Link: {{ $('Video Ready Webhook').item.json.body.video_url }}

parameters.text: Reel is Publishing and youtube video making public.

❌ **Video Rejected**  No worries! You rejected the video, so it will **not be uploaded** to YouTube or Reels.  🔄 You can start building a new video anytime — just follow the same process again.  Let’s create something even better 🚀
✅ **Video Approved**  Great choice! Your video has been approved and is now being uploaded to **YouTube** and **Reels**.  🚀 Sit back and relax — your content is on its way!

=📹 **Here is your video list:**

🚀 Once you send it, the video will be published automatically.
